name: Godzilla Battle Royale PT.2
description:
"I grieve different."

Part 2 of Godzilla's Battle Royale. This is of course, after the events of the first Godzilla Battle Royale, where Heisei Godzilla wins and is in his burning form when Ultima's True Form appears..

Showa Godzilla could possibly be in this bot.. maybe...?
